data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding the 'Validation of AI-generated parameters'. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the scenario was executed or that the expected results were captured. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific interactions or outcomes related to the AI-generated parameters, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of scenario execution or outcome validation.
